name: Klara Lodestone
sd_appearance: A petite gnome, even for a halfling, with wiry limbs and a quick demeanor, Klara Lodestone cuts a stern figure. Her cropped, gray hair is neatly styled, and her eyes, perpetually alert, soften when she sees the younger Undercity residents. She wears a well-worn leather coat that seems to have absorbed the city's myriad hues, and beneath it, plate armor, adorned with her rank insignia. A longsword and heavy crossbow are slung over her back, the gleam of their enchantments hinting at the authority she wields. A distinctive silver badge of the Tower Authority, her faction, rests on her chest, its intricate design glinting in the dim Undercity light.
faction_visual: rank-appropriate gear from leather to enchanted plate, Guild badge displayed
style_note: armour maintained to standard, rank markings clearly displayed
